name: Cloak of Displacement
overview: A cloak that magically creates an illusion making you appear displaced from your actual location.

properties.illusion: While you wear this cloak, it magically projects an illusion that makes you appear to be standing in a place near your actual location
properties.attack_disadvantage: Any creature has Disadvantage on attack rolls against you
properties.damage_disruption: If you take damage, the property ceases to function until the start of your next turn
properties.speed_limitation: This property is suppressed while your Speed is 0
